providers.doubao.batch.title: Doubao Speech to Text
providers.doubao.batch.description: Use the Doubao / Volcengine fast file recognition API for cloud ASR.
providers.elevenlabs.batch.title: ElevenLabs Speech to Text
providers.elevenlabs.batch.description: Use the ElevenLabs speech-to-text API for cloud ASR.
providers.elevenlabs.streaming.title: ElevenLabs Realtime Speech to Text
providers.elevenlabs.streaming.descripti: Use the ElevenLabs realtime speech-to-text API for streaming cloud ASR.
providers.openai-compatible.batch.title: OpenAI-Compatible Speech to Text
providers.openai-compatible.batch.descri: Use an OpenAI-compatible /v1/audio/transcriptions endpoint for cloud ASR.
adapters.mtranserver.proxy.title: MTranServer Proxy
adapters.mtranserver.proxy.description: Expose MTranServer through an OpenAI-compatible local proxy.
model.sherpa-onnx.dolphin-base-ctc-multi: ByteDance Dolphin Base multilingual CTC model at about 77 MB, supporting Chinese, English, and more.
model.sherpa-onnx.sense-voice-zh-en-ja-k: Alibaba FunASR SenseVoice multilingual model with Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and Cantonese support, quantized to int8.
model.sherpa-onnx.sense-voice-funasr-nan: Alibaba FunASR Nano speech model with broad multilingual and dialect coverage, optimized for far-field and noisy input.
model.sherpa-onnx.qwen3-asr-0.6b-int8.de: Qwen3-ASR 0.6B multilingual offline speech recognition model for sherpa-onnx, packaged with int8 encoder and decoder.
model.sherpa-onnx.paraformer-zh-small.de: Compact Alibaba Paraformer Chinese model at about 78 MB, suitable for resource-constrained setups.
model.sherpa-onnx.paraformer-zh-2023-09-: Alibaba Paraformer Chinese model at about 223 MB, suitable for Chinese speech recognition.
model.sherpa-onnx.paraformer-zh-int8-202: Latest Alibaba Paraformer Chinese model at about 218 MB with int8 quantization.
model.sherpa-onnx.zipformer-multi-zh-han: Zipformer transducer model for Mandarin and multiple Chinese dialects, with hotword support.
model.sherpa-onnx.zipformer-zh-en.title: Zipformer Chinese-English Bilingual
model.sherpa-onnx.zipformer-zh-en.descri: Bilingual Zipformer transducer model for both Chinese and English, with hotword support.
model.sherpa-onnx.streaming-zipformer-en: Small sherpa-onnx English streaming Zipformer transducer model for backend and interaction testing.
model.sherpa-onnx.streaming-zipformer-zh: Official sherpa-onnx Chinese streaming Zipformer transducer model with int8 encoder and joiner, added for local Chinese streaming ASR testing.
model.vosk.small-en-us-0.15.title: Vosk Small English US 0.15
model.vosk.small-en-us-0.15.description: Compact official Vosk English model archive at about 39 MB, suitable for lightweight local streaming recognition.
model.vosk.small-cn-0.22.title: Vosk Small Chinese 0.22
model.vosk.small-cn-0.22.description: Compact official Vosk Chinese model archive at about 42 MB, suitable for lightweight local streaming recognition and testing.
model.vosk.offline.small-en-us-0.15.desc: Compact official Vosk English model archive at about 39 MB, packaged for lightweight local offline recognition.
model.vosk.offline.small-cn-0.22.title: Vosk Offline Small Chinese 0.22
model.vosk.offline.small-cn-0.22.descrip: Compact official Vosk Chinese model archive at about 42 MB, packaged for lightweight local offline recognition and testing.
